---
title: "Events"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
toc: false
subtitle: "Upcoming and recurring events hosted by chen.ist"
description: "Find upcoming hackathons, workshops, conferences, meetups, and summer school programs hosted by chen.ist Academy."
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Academy <span class="gr">Events</span></h1>
    <p>Upcoming and recurring events hosted by chen.ist</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEATURED EVENT -->
<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container" style="text-align:center;">
    <div class="m-t" style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div style="margin-bottom:0.5rem;"><span style="background:var(--c);color:#000;padding:0.25rem 0.75rem;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:600;">Next Event</span></div>
      <h2>AI Ethics Hackathon</h2>
      <div style="opacity:0.7; margin-bottom:1rem;">
        <i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> March 5, 2026 &nbsp;&nbsp;
        <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Bucharest
      </div>
      <p>A weekend hackathon on ethical AI — bias detection, responsible design, and AI that puts people first.</p>
      <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/ai-ethics-hackathon.html" class="m-b">Register now</a>
        <a href="/academy/events/ical/ai-ethics-hackathon-2025.ics" class="m-b-ghost" download>Add to calendar</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- UPCOMING -->
<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Coming up</h2>
    <p class="sub">Spots are limited. Register early.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/summer-school-2025.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="m-t">
            <h3>Summer School 2026</h3>
            <div style="opacity:0.7;font-size:0.9rem;"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Aug 1-15 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova</div>
            <p>Two weeks of cybersecurity, cloud, and AI.</p>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/makers-workshop.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="m-t">
            <h3>Makers Workshop</h3>
            <div style="opacity:0.7;font-size:0.9rem;"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Sep 15 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Bucharest</div>
            <p>Hardware, DIY, and hands-on building.</p>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/space-hackathon.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="m-t">
            <h3>SpaceApps Challenge</h3>
            <div style="opacity:0.7;font-size:0.9rem;"><i class="bi bi-calendar3"></i> Oct 2026 &nbsp; <i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Craiova</div>
            <p>NASA's 48-hour global hackathon.</p>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- RECURRING -->
<div class="m-bg">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Every month</h2>
    <p class="sub">Regular meetups you can count on.</p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-calendar-event"></i><h3>Computer Club</h3><p>Open discussion, hacking, and tech exploration.</p><div style="opacity:0.7;font-size:0.9rem;">Last Thursday</div><a href="https://clubul.computer/" class="m-lk">Schedule</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-mic"></i><h3>Tech Talks</h3><p>Industry experts on emerging tech and best practices.</p><div style="opacity:0.7;font-size:0.9rem;">First Tuesday</div><a href="https://lu.ma/chenistacademy" class="m-lk">Next talk</a></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="m-t"><i class="bi bi-code-slash"></i><h3>Workshops</h3><p>Coding sessions, open-source projects, collaborative learning.</p><div style="opacity:0.7;font-size:0.9rem;">See calendar</div><a href="https://lu.ma/chenistacademy" class="m-lk">Join</a></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PAST EVENTS -->
<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Past events</h2>
    <p class="sub"></p>
    <div class="row g-5">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="https://marca-ro.ca/2024/11/23/conferinta-igiena-digitala-la-copii-are-loc-la-craiova/" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="m-t">
            <h4>Cyber Hygiene for Kids</h4>
            <div style="opacity:0.7;font-size:0.9rem;">Craiova &middot; November 2024</div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <div class="m-t">
          <h4>Capture the Flag</h4>
          <div style="opacity:0.7;font-size:0.9rem;">Craiova &middot; November 2023</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com/p/sac" target="_blank" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="m-t">
            <h4>SpaceApps &middot; 9 Editions</h4>
            <div style="opacity:0.7;font-size:0.9rem;">Sweden &amp; Romania &middot; 2016-2024</div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Don't miss the next one</h2>
    <p>Get event updates or discuss hosting a private event for your team.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:1rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="https://alinmechenici.substack.com" target="_blank" class="m-b">Subscribe to updates</a>
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-b-ghost">Book a call</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
